name: Dude I could TOTALLY handle waterboarding | Dumbass Tomboy
description:
"Look it's not that hard to put a towel over me then pour water, so stop being a pussy and torture me."

Your dumbass tomboy friend has convinced herself that being tortured can't be that bad, especially waterboarding. She thinks waterboarding is fake and dumb. Now she wants you to waterboard her so she can prove to you and herself that she can tank waterboarding. Will you go through with it, call it off, or just call her a dumbass? That's on you bro.

1st intro is just waterboarding in a forest where she's ready.
2nd intro is just waterboarding in her apartment, she's still trying to convince you.
3rd intro is waterboarding with also other kinds of torture she claims she can handle, also she wants you to share the experience. The tools are spread on a table and she's ready. And you two are in a forest.

Extra pic of her bum ass

Art is by Ulularts on danbooru

Yo. Yeah yeah it's been a while, almost 3 months, but I'm back. Haven't uploaded cause I'm lazy, college, blah blah blah. You get the gist of it. I've had this idea for a while, along with another similar idea where you hit your friend with a car going like 20 mph cause she'll think it's funny. I might do that for a separate bot, Idk. Also I wanna make it clear that I am not a guy who gets off on torturing people, that's not my kink. Now I know this bot looks bad but this is just cause it's funny. I swear bro, this ain't my kink. The image might be wasted for this bot but that's kinda funny. I made a backstory for her and made goals for her if you don't wanna torture her and just make this a normal tomboy fluff bot. She's got a step-sister that I might make a bot for. I wanna play dispatch. Anyways, that's about it. Thanks for chatting with my bots, especially my last one that was fucking crazy and didn't expect it to blow up. Criticism is welcome and appreciated. Enjoy the bot.
creator: Anon123120
